playbook.intent: Add or change a tool the agent can invoke → ship versioned schema + structured error contract + eval entries, no breaking change in prod.
playbook.scope: Add or change one tool the agent can invoke; ship a versioned schema + structured error contract + eval entries; no breaking change in prod. Single-session focused work, ~half-day.

success-criteria.criterion: Eval rows covering happy + failure paths

stage.name: Design
stage.intent: Name, scope, and describe the tool as a prompt.
stage.decision-gate: Advance once description passes 'an LLM should know when to call this' read.

stage.name: Schema
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when schema passes contract tests.

stage.name: Eval & Ship

tasks.task: Add happy + failure rows to golden set

stage.decision-gate: Promote only when shadow is green and no regressions.

extra.value: [Multi-tool refactors — split into separate sessions, Tool-deprecation lifecycle — see future playbook]
[Treating eval scores as ground truth without judge calibration, Shipping prompt or model changes without a regression gate]
['Can I roll back this change in one step?', 'Is the regression eval committed BEFORE the fix?']

{human: faion get-content new-tool-call-schema-design-session --format md, agent: faion get-content new-tool-call-schema-design-session --format context, json: faion get-content new-tool-call-schema-design-session --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P7 llm-agent-developer persona}]
